tags.inscription: As an institution, the Baguio Apaches has been recognized by the Centennial Commission for its role in making Baguio City what it is now
tags.inscription:1: It has contributed a gamut of public servants such as a Senator, Speaker of the House, Congressmen, Mayors, Vice Mayors, City Councilors, War Heroes,
tags.inscription:2: Military and Police Officers, NBI agents, Presidential Assistants, Judges, Prosecutors and City Hall staffers.
tags.inscription:3: In the fields of Education, Medicine, Engineering, Clergy, Media, Business, Airlines and other endeavours, the leaders in these industries were at one time or another active Braves of the Apache Nation.
tags.inscription:4: Dedicated to the Apache Elder Braves, Past Chiefs and all Braves.
tags.name: The Baguio Apaches
